TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Gurbanguly Berdimuhamedow ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 6, Gurbanguly Berdimuhamedow, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1957) mrhuw Turkmenistan ta' misuw hya' ga Gurbanguly Berdimuhamedow, aring ryax tay 21 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2006 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: ɣurβaŋulj βer*imuħame*ow rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ɣurβaŋulj βer*imuħame*ow, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw turkmenis~ɕtan taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ɣurβaŋulj βer*imuħame*ow, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
S.FORM: Gurbanguly Berdimuhamedow ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 6, Gurbanguly Berdimuhamedow, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1957) mrhuw Turkmenistan ta' misuw hya' ga Gurbanguly Berdimuhamedow, aring ryax tay 21 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2006 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

(minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw turkmenis~ɕtan taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ɣurβaŋulj βer*imuħame*ow, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
